generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance OccupancyActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Automated door actuators modeled within BIM environment for tenant-specific access control"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system actuators (e.g., variable air volume systems) controlled via BIM-enriched models"
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Adaptive lighting control actuators modeled in BIM for dynamic room lighting adjustments"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded occupancy sensors in building spaces that detect human presence for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataStream
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensors embedded in building zones measuring ambient air conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensors tracking relative humidity levels in building environments"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataStream
]

instance EnergyMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy consumption meters capturing real-time power usage data from building systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataStream
]

instance BIMDeviceMetadataExtractor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Automated metadata extraction component that processes BIM model annotations for device configurations"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BIMMetadataDataStream
]

// C4: Data Transmitted
instance OccupancyDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMeter
]

instance BIMMetadataDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BIMDeviceMetadataExtractor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Comprehensive BIM model of the building infrastructure enriched with device-level metadata for DT runtime extraction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoMiddleware, UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance RuntimeControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-driven control logic artifacts generated from BIM models for actuator interface creation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoMiddleware, DittoServiceOrchestrator
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Machine learning models for energy consumption forecasting and fault detection integrated with DT services"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoServiceOrchestrator, CustomPluginSystem
]

instance VisualizationSceneModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine scene models representing building zones with embedded DT visualization elements"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance AdaptiveLightingControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Domain-specific control model for adaptive lighting optimization using reinforcement learning"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CustomPluginSystem
]

instance FaultDetectionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AI-based fault detection model for building systems identifying anomalies in real-time"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoServiceOrchestrator
]

instance OccupancyPredictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Time-series forecasting model predicting building occupancy patterns for resource optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoServiceOrchestrator
]

instance EnergyOptimizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Optimization model for energy consumption reduction across building systems"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoServiceOrchestrator
]

instance BIMDeviceConfigurationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Extracted metadata from BIM models containing device IDs, sampling rates, and physical locations"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BIMMetadataDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoMiddleware
]

instance RealTimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated real-time data streams from building sensors for DT processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataStream, HumidityDataStream, EnergyConsumptionDataStream, OccupancyDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoServiceOrchestrator
]

instance PredictedOperationalMetrics : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Forecasted operational metrics generated by predictive analytics models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PredictiveAnalyticsModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance ControlCommandData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Actuator command data generated by DT services for physical building control"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RuntimeControlLogicModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoMiddleware
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework automating transformation of BIM models into runtime artifacts (service interfaces, visualization scripts)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BuildingBIMModel, BIMDeviceConfigurationData
]

instance EclipseHonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time IoT middleware enabling bidirectional data exchange between physical devices and DT via standardized protocols"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeOperationalData, ControlCommandData, BIMDeviceConfigurationData
]

instance DittoServiceOrchestrator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standardized DT platform for service orchestration, extensibility, and real-time data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsModel, FaultDetectionModel, OccupancyPredictionModel, EnergyOptimizationModel
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization environment for DT monitoring and simulation with interactive stakeholder collaboration features"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationSceneModel, PredictedOperationalMetrics
]

instance CustomPluginSystem : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Extension framework allowing DT Engineers to deploy domain-specific plugins (e.g., adaptive lighting control, reinforcement learning models)"
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveLightingControlModel
]

instance BIMTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling tools (Revit, ArchiCAD) used for device modeling and control logic definition"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BuildingBIMModel, BIMDeviceConfigurationData
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time data visualization and operational status monitoring for building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeOperationalDashboard
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offers energy consumption forecasting and operational efficiency predictions using machine learning models"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionForecast, FaultDetectionAlerts
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables immersive visualization through Unreal Engine for stakeholder collaboration and decision-making"
    DTDFVocab:provides ImmersiveBuildingVisualization
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides domain-specific control services through custom plugins (e.g., reinforcement learning for lighting optimization)"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveLightingControl, ReinforcementLearningOptimization
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated optimization service for building systems (e.g., HVAC, lighting) based on real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionOptimization, OperationalEfficiencyImprovement
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeOperationalDashboard : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive dashboard showing real-time operational metrics (temperature, occupancy, energy usage) for Facility Managers"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionForecast : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted energy consumption patterns for the next 24-48 hours based on historical data and occupancy trends"
]

instance FaultDetectionAlerts : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time alerts identifying potential faults in building systems (e.g., HVAC malfunctions, sensor failures)"
]

instance ImmersiveBuildingVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D interactive visualization of the building environment with embedded DT components for immersive monitoring"
]

instance AdaptiveLightingControl : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic lighting control system adjusting room lighting based on occupancy patterns and energy optimization goals"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ReinforcementLearningOptimization : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "AI-driven optimization using reinforcement learning to continuously improve building system performance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergyConsumptionOptimization : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated optimization of energy consumption across building systems (HVAC, lighting, etc.) based on real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OperationalEfficiencyImprovement : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Continuous improvement of building operational efficiency through data-driven adjustments to control parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C17: Environment/Component
instance BuildingZoneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains OccupancySensor, TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, EnergyMeter, OccupancyActuator, HVACActuator, LightingActuator
]

instance DTControlSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BuildingBIMModel, RuntimeControlLogicModel, PredictiveAnalyticsModel, EclipseHonoMiddleware, DittoServiceOrchestrator, UnrealEngineVisualization, CustomPluginSystem
]

instance MultiTwinConfiguration : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Framework supporting decentralized DT deployment where individual BIM-enriched models represent different building zones"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Facilitates **control signal transmission** from the DT to physical actuators via standardized middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto). The framework generates runtime interfaces that process DT-generated commands (e.g., lighting control, HVAC adjustments) and execute them on physical devices, enabling closed-loop operation and adaptive control strategies (e.g., reinforcement learning-based optimization in BOREALIS)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Operates on a **real-time to near-real-time scale**, with data synchronization rates determined by sensor sampling frequencies (e.g., 1-second updates for occupancy sensors, 5-second updates for energy meters). The framework ensures **low-latency bidirectional communication** (≤100ms) via Eclipse Hono/Ditto for live DT-to-physical system synchronization, supporting adaptive control loops and predictive maintenance."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrates a **modular, service-oriented DT ecosystem** where:
  - **BIM models** serve as the central semantic foundation, linking physical assets to DT services.
  - **Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware** enables real-time data synchronization between physical devices and DT components.
  - **Unreal Engine** provides an immersive visualization layer for stakeholder interaction.
  - **Standardized extension points** allow DT Engineers to integrate custom services (e.g., analytics, control algorithms) without disrupting the core architecture."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the **entire building life cycle**, from:
  - **Design phase**: BIM models enriched with device metadata for initial DT setup.
  - **Construction phase**: Automated extraction of physical asset data for integration into the DT.
  - **Operation phase**: Real-time monitoring, control, and optimization via DT services (e.g., adaptive lighting in BOREALIS).
  The DT represents the physical counterpart as **operated**, ensuring alignment with real-world conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Ensures **high fidelity and validity** through:
  - **Verification/Validation**: The Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric evaluates the DT’s alignment with the physical system, measuring interoperability and architectural soundness.
  - **Uncertainty management**: BIM models are validated for consistency with physical asset specifications (e.g., sensor accuracy, control logic correctness).
  - **Continuous synchronization**: Real-time data streams (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) minimize drift between virtual and physical representations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Established via:
  - **Network protocols**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto support MQTT and WebSocket for low-latency bidirectional communication.
  - **Middleware architecture**: Couples BIM models with IoT devices through standardized endpoints (e.g., tenant/device IDs) for seamless data exchange."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed as a **scalable, service-oriented platform** with:
  - **Modular architecture**: Extension points allow integration of custom services (e.g., analytics, control algorithms) without redeployment.
  - **Cloud/edge deployment**: Middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) enables distributed hosting for real-time data processing.
  - **Unreal Engine integration**: Visualization components are deployed as interactive web applications or standalone apps."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Enables integration with:
  - **External BIM systems**: Standardized extension points allow compatibility with other BIM tools (e.g., Revit, ArchiCAD).
  - **IoT platforms**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto supports interoperability with third-party sensor networks.
  - **Analytics tools**: Custom services can interface with external platforms (e.g., cloud-based optimization engines)."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Not explicitly detailed in the documents, but implied to follow:
  - **Physical asset ownership**: Data generated by sensors/actuators is owned by the building owner (PT owner).
  - **DT service provider ownership**: Custom services (e.g., analytics plugins) may retain metadata for operational purposes, adhering to privacy policies (e.g., GDPR compliance)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adheres to:
  - **BIM standards**: IFC (Industry Foundation Classes) for semantic interoperability between BIM models and DT components.
  - **IoT middleware standards**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange.
  - **Service-oriented architecture**: Standardized extension points for modular DT development."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Ensures safety through:
  - **Remote operation controls**: DT services can execute commands on physical devices remotely, but with safeguards to prevent unauthorized access (e.g., role-based authentication).
  - **Cybersecurity protocols**: Middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) supports encryption and access control for data integrity.
  - **Human-in-the-loop**: Facility Managers interact with the DT to validate critical decisions (e.g., emergency shutdowns)."
]
